title: Cafe Hostess
writer: Harold Shumate, Tay Garnett, Howard Higgin
actors: Preston Foster, Ann Dvorak, Douglas Fowley
plot: Jo (Ann Dvorak), a "percentage girl" at the notorious Club 46, is in despair. She can see no way out of the dreary and sordid routine of entertaining customers - called drinking and dancing in 1940 - and, at a signal from piano pl...
